'''yakono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ugali|ugali]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ugali|ugali]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yakono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yækeneth|yækeneth]] || [[word:yækenej|yækenej]] || [[word:yækenesh|yækenesh]] || [[word:yækene|yækene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yakokonoth|yakokonoth]] || [[word:yakokonoj|yakokonoj]] || [[word:yakokonosh|yakokonosh]] || [[word:yakokono|yakokono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yakonoth|yakonoth]] || [[word:yakonoj|yakonoj]] || [[word:yakonosh|yakonosh]] || [[word:yakono|yakono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yakofnoth|yakofnoth]] || [[word:yakofnoj|yakofnoj]] || [[word:yakofnosh|yakofnosh]] || [[word:yakofnof|yakofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yakonotho|yakonotho]] || [[word:yakonojo|yakonojo]] || [[word:yakonosho|yakonosho]] || [[word:yakonoko|yakonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yakonoth|yakonoth]] || [[word:yakonoj|yakonoj]] || [[word:yakonosh|yakonosh]] || [[word:yakono|yakono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yakonothol|yakonothol]] || [[word:yakonojol|yakonojol]] || [[word:yakonoshol|yakonoshol]] || [[word:yakonokol|yakonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yakonothotho|yakonothotho]] || [[word:yakonojojo|yakonojojo]] || [[word:yakonoshosho|yakonoshosho]] || [[word:yakonoko|yakonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yakonothon|yakonothon]] || [[word:yakonojon|yakonojon]] || [[word:yakonoshon|yakonoshon]] || [[word:yakonokon|yakonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yakonothoro|yakonothoro]] || [[word:yakonojoro|yakonojoro]] || [[word:yakonoshoro|yakonoshoro]] || [[word:yakonokoro|yakonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
